entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: '数据内容' → '内容分类'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key '数据内容' → Data_Category entity. Second-level key '内容分类' → Content_Type entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (Data_Category) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Content_Type). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024". Attach remarks columns ['备注', '项目'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '数据内容' defines the root entity (Data_Category).
Second-level key '内容分类' defines child entities (Content_Type) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
